description: Low-capacity strategy selector used to illustrate the paper protocol. The selector uses only task metadata and original-skill profiles before agent execution.

rules.description: Validation-heavy procedural workflows preserve ordered checks and recovery cues.
Scientific tasks often rely on equations, units, thresholds, and conventions.
Formula- or schema-heavy skills need exact invariants preserved.
Schema/statistical-definition-heavy data analysis benefits from rule/formula anchoring.

leakage_control: No held-out verifier score, solution, agent trace, or downstream token usage is used by this selector at inference time.
